description: Gogs is an open-source self-hosted Git service for hosting repositories, managing users and organizations, and exposing Git operations over web, SSH, and HTTP. Its documentation site also publishes a read-only MCP server for searching and reading the docs.
summary: Gogs exposes a self-hosted REST API authenticated with personal access tokens, a local `gogs` administration CLI, and two public read-only docs MCP endpoints at `gogs.io/mcp` and Mintlify’s host.
